data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="蔗糖溶解实验" goal="观察蔗糖在水中的溶解过程，并判断是否形成均一透明的糖水溶液" difficulty="Easy" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="beaker_1" type="beaker" capacity="100ml" />
      <Component id="measuring_cylinder_1" type="measuring_cylinder" capacity="25ml" />
      <Component id="spatula_1" type="spatula" />
      <Component id="glass_rod_1" type="glass_rod" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Distilled_Water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Sucrose" state="solid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="measuring_cylinder_1" reagent="H2O" volume="20 mL" id="step_0" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="measuring_cylinder_1" to_vessel="beaker_1" volume="20 mL" id="step_1" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="C12H22O11" mass="5 g" tool="spatula_1" id="step_2" />
      <Insert tool="glass_rod_1" vessel="beaker_1" id="step_3" />
      <Stir vessel="beaker_1" id="step_4" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_5" />
      <Stir vessel="beaker_1" id="step_6" />
      <Wait time="60s" id="step_7" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 量取蒸馏水并将其转移至烧杯，为溶解蔗糖做准备。

插入玻璃棒，分阶段搅拌并静置，观察蔗糖的溶解过程。
